full_text:
Jia Fan иіҲзҜ„
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jia Fan (иіҲзҜ„). Officer of Gongsun Yuan. Was executed by Yuan for opposing his declaration of independence. Jia Fan may not have existed in history. Jia Fan was affiliated with Gongsun Yuan and the Wei Kingdom.
